---
title: "Blog"
description: "Notes and essays"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: article
---

::: {.blog-intro}
::: {.blog-kicker}
Notes and essays
:::

I use this space for informal notes on statistics, machine learning, quantitative finance, research workflows, and occasional reflections.
:::
